intent: REWRITE (2026-04-28, after corpus audit). Replaces the previous story 4 which had three audited defects: (1) restated reflection 「小さい花です」 immediately after 「赤い花」 in s1, (2) teleporting friend in s3 with no entrance staging, and (3) observational gaze-flip closer 「友達は私の手を見ます」. Conservative rewrite: PRESERVES the original mint set (赤い, ドア, 上 — all already in vocab from prior ship, zero cascade) and INTRODUCES NO new grammar (deliberate — to avoid corpus-wide reinforcement-debt failure for any new point that doesn't reappear in stories 5–10; story 4's coverage_floor obligation is satisfied because all the grammar points used here are already attributed). Fixes the literary defects only. (a) Stages friend's entrance AT s0 via companion-と (友達と公園を歩きます) — friend is co-present from the very first sentence; no later teleport. This also reinforces G010_to_and (still in its R1 window). (b) Replaces the restated reflection with a tactile beat carrying new info: 卵と花は暖かいです — the just-minted-yesterday egg (W00052, must-reinforce per R1 gate) and the just-received flower share warmth, threading the warmth motif from story 3 forward. Listing-と reinforces G010_to_and a second time. (c) Replaces the observational closer with a departure beat: 友達は朝の道を歩きます — the friend walks back down the morning road, one of §C.2's allowed fresh closer patterns (DEPARTURE: friend walks away, anchor stays). Anchor 赤い花 changes location twice (above the door → friend's hand → narrator's hand) and the friend has agency at every appearance.

sentences.jp: 朝、私は友達と公園を歩きます。
sentences.en: In the morning, I walk through the park with my friend.

sentences.jp: 公園のドアの上に赤い花があります。
sentences.en: Above the park's door there is a red flower.

sentences.jp: 友達は赤い花を取ります。
sentences.en: My friend takes the red flower.
Both the egg and the flower are warm.

sentences.jp: 友達は花を私の手に渡します。
sentences.en: My friend hands the flower into my hand.

sentences.jp: 友達は朝の道を歩きます。
sentences.en: My friend walks back down the morning road.
